testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-i18n > switches locale at runtime and updates translations
@stynx-web/angular-i18n > uses default supported locale and missing interpolation values
@stynx-web/angular-i18n > formats ICU plural messages through the active locale catalog
@stynx-web/angular-i18n > refreshes cached ICU formatters when a locale catalog is reloaded
@stynx-web/angular-i18n > switches locale through the component and marks the translate pipe for check on locale changes
@stynx-web/angular-i18n > formats dates, numbers, and currencies through the active locale
@stynx-web/angular-i18n > returns an empty string for empty and invalid Intl pipe inputs
